what_stands_out: A clear divide exists between employees who value the benefits and those who feel overwhelmed by the physical and mental demands of the job.
Management style is a polarized topic, with some teams described as supportive while others are cited for toxicity and favoritism.
The company is often viewed as a great place to work, yet many employees express frustration with the sustainability of their roles over time.
